calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Robert Kun Wong, Esq. represented the petitioner. Interpreter, Sherine Kuanis is sworn to interpret Cantonese language and Petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing Petitioner's name to Shun You Liu.
